title: Land retained-records and machine-contract slice
summary: Commits the retained-records cutover, control-plane contract updates, and related runtime changes.
scope_items: Retire ledgers in favor of retained records across control-plane artifacts and runtime helpers.
Validate purge, retention, acceptance, and evidence behavior against record paths and schema IDs.
done_when_items: The retained-records slice is committed as a coherent change set.
